docs.text: ontoview Demo Interactive ontology visualization and SHACL validation plugin for MkDocs. Features Interactive graph visualization with formal ontology notation Click any node to see IRI, type, connections, and SHACL constraints Inline TTL editor with live validation Publication-ready PNG and SVG export (with legend included) Download TTL data directly Color-coded by ontology source (BFO, IAO, FOAF, Schema.org, etc.) Namespace legend with toggle to show/hide unused prefixes Examples FOAF Person — every Person must have a name Schema.org Article — scholarly articles need author, title, date Quick Start pip install ontoview Add to mkdocs.yml : plugins : - ontoview Use in markdown: ```ontoview source: path/to/data.ttl shape: path/to/shape.ttl ```
docs.title: Home

docs.text: Interactive ontology visualization and SHACL validation plugin for MkDocs.
docs.title: ontoview Demo

docs.text: Interactive graph visualization with formal ontology notation Click any node to see IRI, type, connections, and SHACL constraints Inline TTL editor with live validation Publication-ready PNG and SVG export (with legend included) Download TTL data directly Color-coded by ontology source (BFO, IAO, FOAF, Schema.org, etc.) Namespace legend with toggle to show/hide unused prefixes
docs.title: Features

docs.text: FOAF Person — every Person must have a name Schema.org Article — scholarly articles need author, title, date
docs.title: Examples

docs.text: pip install ontoview Add to mkdocs.yml : plugins : - ontoview Use in markdown: ```ontoview source: path/to/data.ttl shape: path/to/shape.ttl ```
docs.title: Quick Start

docs.text: FOAF Person A FOAF Person must have a name and at most one mailbox. + − Fit ⛶ PNG SVG TTL Colors Edit & Validate TTL Editor Validation Results Validate Update Graph Reset Try it Click Edit & Validate to modify the TTL data. Try removing foaf:name from Alice and click Validate to see the SHACL violation.

docs.text: Click Edit & Validate to modify the TTL data. Try removing foaf:name from Alice and click Validate to see the SHACL violation.

docs.text: Role Bearer Shape A role (BFO_0000023) must always have a bearer via ro:role_of and be realized in a process via bfo:realized_in . + − Fit ⛶ PNG SVG TTL Colors Edit & Validate TTL Editor Validation Results Validate Update Graph Reset Constraint Details Property Path Min count Meaning role_of RO_0000081 1 The role must belong to some entity realized_in BFO_0000054 1 The role must be realized in some process

docs.text: Property Path Min count Meaning role_of RO_0000081 1 The role must belong to some entity realized_in BFO_0000054 1 The role must be realized in some process

docs.text: Role Realization Shape A role (BFO_0000023) must be realized in at least one process via bfo:realized_in . + − Fit ⛶ PNG SVG TTL Colors Edit & Validate TTL Editor Validation Results Validate Update Graph Reset

docs.text: A role (BFO_0000023) must be realized in at least one process via bfo:realized_in . + − Fit ⛶ PNG SVG TTL Colors Edit & Validate TTL Editor Validation Results Validate Update Graph Reset

docs.text: Schema.org Scholarly Article A Schema.org ScholarlyArticle must have a name, at least one author, and exactly one publication date. + − Fit ⛶ PNG SVG TTL Colors Edit & Validate TTL Editor Validation Results Validate Update Graph Reset Try it Click Edit & Validate to experiment. Try removing schema:author or schema:datePublished and validate to see the constraint violations.
